graded_findings.rationale: The documentation presents generated metastore_head_nodes as deployable via dscli up, but the gathered evidence says the command only reads a single metastore_head_node. That is a substantive HA deployment mismatch, not a cosmetic docs issue.

The design document claims every metastore_head_nodes entry starts a Metastore service while the implementation only enables one node. This misstates the implemented HA semantics and could lead operators to rely on unavailable redundancy.

The repository context records dscli metastore_ha as a multi-head flow without preserving the single-head limitation found in source. Because this shared AI context guides future infrastructure work, the stale claim is a material adherence gap.
